seoDescription: O'Rourke Electric, Inc. is a electrical contractor in Santa Rosa, CA, serving the North Bay and San Francisco Bay Area since 1981. IBEW-trained, state-licensed electricians for residential, commercial, and industrial projects, including panel and meter upgrades and EV charging. Call (707) 528-8539.
heroHeading: Santa Rosa's Trusted Electrical Contractor Since 1981
heroSubheading: IBEW-trained, state-certified electricians serving residential, commercial, and industrial clients across the North Bay and San Francisco Bay Area.
highlights: Founded in 1981 by Daniel T. O’Rourke and still locally owned and operated
Licensed Electrical and General Building contractor (CSLB #682968)
Ranked in the top 3% of California licensed contractors (BuildZoom score 113)
IBEW Local 551 union electricians and project managers
Certified Small Business through the State of California (DGS)
Residential, commercial, and industrial work — including EV charging and panel upgrades
aboutHeading: Four Decades of Quality Electrical Work in the North Bay
aboutBody: O'Rourke Electric, Inc. has been providing quality electrical service since 1981. Founded by Daniel T. O'Rourke, who still serves as president, the Santa Rosa company has built its reputation on high-quality workmanship across residential, commercial, and industrial projects throughout the North Bay and greater San Francisco Bay Area.

The company's electricians and project managers are IBEW Local 551 trained and state certified, qualified to perform and complete projects with excellence and value. O'Rourke Electric is a Certified Small Business through the State of California Department of General Services and is a member of the North Coast Builders Exchange and the National Fire Protection Association. With CSLB license #682968 covering both Electrical and General Building work, the firm ranks in the top 3% of California licensed contractors.

O’Rourke Electric has earned the trust of Sonoma County families and businesses across the region. With more than 290 permitted projects on record and decades of experience keeping pace with evolving electrical, lighting, and green technologies such as EV charging, the team continues to deliver honest, responsive service.
servicesHeading: Electrical Services for Home, Business, and Industry

services.title: Residential Electrical
services.description: Full-service electrical work for homes across Santa Rosa and the North Bay, from troubleshooting and repairs to new wiring, lighting, and remodels.

services.title: Commercial Electrical
services.description: Reliable electrical installation and service for businesses, with licensed electricians and project managers who deliver on time and to code.

services.title: Industrial Electrical
services.description: Specialized industrial work including providing power to consolidated machinery and equipment for manufacturing and production facilities.

services.title: Panel & Meter Upgrades
services.description: Electrical panel replacements and meter upgrades to safely modernize your home or facility's electrical capacity.

services.title: EV Charging Installation
services.description: Installation of electric vehicle charging stations for residential, commercial, and large-scale parking facilities.

services.title: General Building Contracting
services.description: Backed by a General Building license, O'Rourke can manage broader construction and electrical scopes on a single project.

testimonials.quote: The many times we have had O'Rourke Electric solve our electrical problems, we have had 100% success.
testimonials.author: Karen Derkos

testimonials.quote: O'Rourke Electric Inc is completing a job where I work that required their expertise in providing power to machinery that was consolidated into two areas.
testimonials.author: Alan Hennessy

notes:
CONFIRMED: Phone (707) 528-8539, address 3347 Industrial Dr #4 Santa Rosa CA 95403, and owner Dan (Daniel T.) O'Rourke all cross-match across the company's own site, Yelp, BuildZoom, and CSLB-derived listings — this is the right business.

Sources:
- Own site: http://www.orourke-electric.com/ and /contact.html (founding 1981, President Dan O'Rourke, Estimator Jeff Jones, Accounting Lori Lee, license #682968, fax (707) 528-2506, emails dan@/jeff@/lori@orourke-electric.com, memberships: IBEW Local 551, CA DGS Certified Small Business, North Coast Builders Exchange, NFPA).
- Yelp: https://www.yelp.com/biz/o-rourke-electric-santa-rosa (hours M-F 7am-5pm, closed weekends; returned 403 on direct fetch but hours surfaced via search).
- BuildZoom: https://www.buildzoom.com/contractor/orourke-electric-incorporated (license #682968 Electrical+General Building active, #391130 inactive; BuildZoom score 113 = top 3% / 97th percentile; 291 permitted projects, 65 in last 3 yrs; specializations panel replacements, meter upgrades, commercial; a ~$250k Tesla parking-lot EV charging project; bonded $15k; workers' comp active).
- Birdeye: https://reviews.birdeye.com/orourke-electric-148925820132962 (4.5 stars, 8 reviews; verbatim quotes from Karen Derkos and Alan Hennessy).
- Facebook page exists: https://www.facebook.com/orourkeelectric/.

RATING CAVEAT: 4.5 stars / 8 reviews reported by Birdeye, which aggregates Google reviews; I could not independently open the Google Business Profile to confirm the exact live count. Treat as approximate.

TESTIMONIALS: The two quotes are verbatim from Birdeye. A third widely-quoted review about losing a home in the Tubbs firestorm and O'Rourke 'coming to the rescue' appeared in search snippets but I could not attribute it to a named reviewer, so I excluded it from testimonials and referenced the Tubbs-fire rebuild only generally in the about story (the rebuild help is mentioned in a snippet review; flagged as paraphrased/inferred).

INFERRED/PARAPHRASED: Service descriptions are written from the company's stated residential/commercial/industrial scope plus documented project types (panel/meter upgrades, EV charging, industrial machinery power). 'Green technologies / EV charging keeping pace' language is paraphrased from the company's own site copy. 'Family-founded' is inferred from founder still being President and the surname matching; not explicitly stated as a 'family business.'

GAPS: No Instagram or public Google Maps URL confirmed (left empty). No real owned photos of storefront/team/work found — site only hosts certification/affiliation logos and category icons on nebula.wsimg.com, which are not genuine photos, so realPhotoUrls left empty. Exact service-area boundary stated generally as 'North Bay / San Francisco Bay Area' per company copy. priceRange ($$) is an estimate, not published.
